---
id: execute-device-command
title: "Control Devices by Commands"
description: "Use commands to control device."
sidebar_label: "Control Devices by Commands"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Control Devices by Commands"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/command/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Use commands to control device.
The required parameters, such as endpointId, functionCode, commandCode, and fieldCode, should be obtained from the /devices/definitions API before making a control request.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"Endpoint ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"Function code, e.g.: NetworkCommissioning"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"Command code, e.g.: TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload"},"args":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Command parameters","required":["fieldCode","value"],"properties":{"fieldCode":{"type":"string","description":"Field code"},"value":{"description":"Field value. The type is consistent with the parameter.type of the corresponding field.","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"CommandArg"},"description":"Command field object list"}},"title":"CommandExecuteItem"}}},"title":"CommandExecuteRequest"},"examples":{"executeCommand":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","args":[{"fieldCode":"InstallCode","value":"F9B34846413AB5DE81B60E63E440"},{"fieldCode":"MAC","value":"54EF441000EB0CCF"}]}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Request succeeded. However, it does not mean all commands were executed successfully.<br />A code value of 0 indicates at least some commands succeeded; a non-zero code indicates all commands failed.<br/>If data is present, it represents the collection of commands that failed; if not, all commands succeeded.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","description":"The array elements are the commands that failed to be executed.","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode","code","message"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"Endpoint ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"Function code"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"Command code"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Error message"}},"title":"CommandExecuteResult"}}}}],"example":{"type":"ExecuteCommandResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000019","code":0,"message":"success","data":[]},"title":"CommandExecuteResponse"},"examples":{"commandFailed":{"value":{"type":"ExecuteCommandResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf9","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"HubCoordination","commandCode":"APIBindSubdeviceWithSecurityCode","code":2201,"message":"invalid security code"}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request parameter error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx is required"},"description":"Error response.
